description: Integration test: faction ending correctly detected when rep >= 80 at run end

invariants_checked.notes: THRESHOLD_ENDING = 80.0 defined at line 14. get_available_endings loops FACTIONS array, checks float(factions.get(faction, 0.0)) >= THRESHOLD_ENDING. Logic correct.

invariants_checked.check: store_run.check_run_end() includes faction_endings_available in all 3 ending paths
invariants_checked.notes: All 3 return statements (life_depleted, victory, hard_max) include 'faction_endings_available': faction_endings. faction_rep sourced correctly from state.get('meta',{}).get('faction_rep',{}).

invariants_checked.check: faction_endings_available flows through merlin_game_controller to show_end_screen
invariants_checked.notes: result.get('ending',{}) passed directly to ui.show_end_screen(ending). ending dict contains faction_endings_available. No filtering occurs.

invariants_checked.check: ui_overlay_endscreen.show_end_screen() displays faction choice panel when faction_endings_available is non-empty
invariants_checked.notes: grep for 'faction' in ui_overlay_endscreen.gd returns 0 matches. The active end screen has NO faction ending support whatsoever. faction_endings_available is silently ignored. The faction-aware implementation exists in end_run_screen.gd but is in the dead game_flow_controller path.

invariants_checked.check: faction_ending_chosen signal is wired to record in echo_memory (game_flow_controller.gd:238)
invariants_checked.notes: game_flow_controller.wire_end_screen() correctly connects faction_ending_chosen signal (fixed in prev cycle). But since ui_overlay_endscreen never emits this signal, the wiring is unreachable in active gameplay.

summary: Detection logic PASS (3/3 checks). Display FAIL_CRITICAL: ui_overlay_endscreen.gd has 0 faction support. No player can ever see or choose a faction ending.

new_tasks.title: Add faction ending choice panel to ui_overlay_endscreen.gd
new_tasks.description: ui_overlay_endscreen.show_end_screen(ending) must read ending.get('faction_endings_available',[]) and, if non-empty, display a faction choice panel (buttons per faction, emitting faction_ending_chosen signal or calling the recording logic directly). Mirror the pattern from end_run_screen.gd:_show_faction_choice_panel() but adapted to the overlay architecture. Single faction auto-selects, 2+ shows buttons. Also connect faction_ending_chosen to game_flow_controller._on_faction_ending_chosen() if available.
